achievements.title: Important Information
achievements.description: Talk to all 5 Information-Toads.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Switcheroo
achievements.description: Activate all three big switches.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: First Achievement
achievements.description: Collect 10 power stars.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Ready for Round Two
achievements.description: Collect 50 power stars.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: The Final Fight
achievements.description: Collect 110 power stars.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Big Shiny Collection
achievements.description: Collect 150 power stars.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: DONE!
achievements.description: Beat Bowser the third time and win the game.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Legendary Beginnings
achievements.description: Find the mysterious Hidden Object in Molten Treasure Chest.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legendary Luster
achievements.description: Find the mysterious Hidden Object in Luminium-Sphere.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legendary Loss
achievements.description: Find the mysterious Hidden Object in Ombru-Sphere.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legendary Masterpiece
achievements.description: Find the mysterious Hidden Object in Bowser's Crystal Palace.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legendary Remnant
achievements.description: Find the mysterious Hidden Object in Magma Temple.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Greedy!
achievements.description: Collect all 129 coins in the Dice-Fortress.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Risky Collection
achievements.description: Collect all 122 coins at the Skyward Slopes.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Sunken Treasure
achievements.description: Collect all 139 coins in the Azure-Abyss.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: City Cash
achievements.description: Collect all 157 coins in System of a Town.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Phantom Treasure
achievements.description: Collect all 251 coins in the Haunted Factory.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Cave o' Cash
achievements.description: Collect all 135 coins in the Stalagmite Cave.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Difficult Procedure
achievements.description: Collect all 167 coins around the Icecrystal-Tower.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Gold in the Desert
achievements.description: Collect all 144 coins in the Overheating Oasis.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Flowery Coinrain
achievements.description: Collect all 125 coins in the Flowery Gardens.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Swampy Treasure
achievements.description: Collect all 133 coins in the Swampy Spring.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Lightning Speed and Patience
achievements.description: Collect all 134 coins at the Sunny Beach.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Cliff Coins
achievements.description: Collect all 127 coins at the Cliff of Wrath.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Biggest Cash Prize
achievements.description: Collect all 255 coins in the Molten Treasure Chest.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Unbelievable Task
achievements.description: Collect all 148 coins in the Luminium-Sphere.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Deadly Coins
achievements.description: Collect all 141 coins in the Ombru-Sphere.
achievements.author: ShadwSonic

achievements.title: Perfect Score
achievements.description: Get the coin maximum in every level.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Without Help
achievements.description: Get star 2, 3, 4 or 5 in the Dice-Fortress without using the purple switch.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Flying Champ
achievements.description: Open the box of star 6 in the Dice-Fortress while flying.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: True Master of Jumping
achievements.description: Get on top of the black wall next to the star 3 of the Skyward Slopes.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Command Disregard
achievements.description: Reach star 5 in the Azure-Abyss without using the Metal Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Flower Picker
achievements.description: Reach and defeat the upper Piranha Plants in System of a Town without diving through the sewer system.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ouch!
achievements.description: Reach the secret treasure room in the Haunted Factory without using the shell.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ouch, the second time!
achievements.description: Reach star 2 of the Stalagmite Cave without using walljumps anywhere in the level.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ouch, the third time!
achievements.description: Get crushed by a Thwomp in the Stalagmite Cave.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Headaches
achievements.description: Groundpound on top of King Whomp when he is standing.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Get a Life (or Two)
achievements.description: Collect both extra lives in the Overheating Oasis in one go.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Windless
achievements.description: Get on top of the Windmill's Wheel in the Flowery Gardens.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fast and Furious
achievements.description: Win against Koopa in less than 10 seconds.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mafia
achievements.description: Kick all Bullies at the Sunny Beach into the Water.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Innovation
achievements.description: Defeat King Boo by using longjumps.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Risk Taker
achievements.description: Jump from King Boo's platform to the pillar of star 2.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mountain Climber
achievements.description: Get on top of the 4 mountain peaks in the Molten Treasure Chest without using the cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Waste Disposal
achievements.description: Destroy all 5 empty !-Boxes in the Luminium-Sphere in one go.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Trimmed
achievements.description: Collect the red coins in the Ombru-Sphere without using the Wing Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Boxpile Madness
achievements.description: Destroy all 8 empty !-Boxes in the Ombru-Sphere in one go.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Animal Cruelty
achievements.description: Place the rabbit inside the river.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Who Put That There?
achievements.description: Collect all 4 extra lives at the third part of the overworld which float directly over the lava in one go.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Get a Life Again
achievements.description: Reach the extra live in the Green Switch Palace.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Flying Expert
achievements.description: Collect the red coins of the Red Switch Palace and use the cannon only once.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Enemy Abuse
achievements.description: Get to the star behind the narrow path in the Blue Switch Palace by jumping onto the Fly Guy.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Sliding Champion
achievements.description: Reach the end of the Frozen Slide without pressing the A-Button and collect all 4 red coins that are on the track.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Champion's Challenging Challenge
achievements.description: Reach the star of the Champion's Challenge without using longjumps.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Climbin' Ape
achievements.description: Get on top of the big building in Bowser's Badlands Battlefield without using the cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Suicide Kill
achievements.description: Pick up the Chuckya at Bowser's Aquatic Castle and swim into an underwater twister with him in your hands.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fungus Maximus
achievements.description: Collect all 10 extra lives in Bowser's Crystal Palace in one go.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Back to the Good Old Days
achievements.description: Obtain star 151 by taking the path through the pipe, and do not use a BLJ.
achievements.author: SporyTike
